documents.title: WebGPU Browser Ops
documents.text: Browser-side GPU inference needs predictable adapter acquisition, cache reuse, and frame-safe scheduling for repeatable experiments.

documents.title: Embeddings Index Build
documents.text: Document embeddings are generated in batches, normalized to fixed dimensions, and written into a reusable index for query retrieval.

documents.title: Worker Safety
documents.text: Workers isolate background compute from the main thread, but they still need warm cache behavior and benchmark-friendly telemetry.

documents.title: RAG Pipeline
documents.text: A browser RAG baseline ingests local documents, chunks them, embeds each chunk, ranks retrieval candidates, and cites the matched sources.

documents.title: Speech Fallback
documents.text: Speech transcription experiments need file-level latency, partial-result timing, and a clear fallback path when the preferred runtime is unavailable.

documents.title: Runtime Shootout
documents.text: Runtime comparisons should hold prompt size, output length, and cache state constant while measuring TTFT and steady-state decode throughput.

queries.text: Which document describes building and reusing an embeddings index in batches?
Which note explains browser retrieval with chunking and citations?
Which document covers prompt size and decode throughput for runtime comparisons?
